notes: Queries are editorial hypotheses until validated with Google Search Console query-page data. Title tests require meaningful impressions before activation.

pages.intent: Calculate adult BMI from height and weight and interpret the screening category.
pages.snippetAngle: Metric and imperial adult BMI calculation with category context and limitations.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own current-BMI calculation. Healthy Weight Range owns height-to-range queries; Body Fat owns circumference estimates.
titleTests: BMI Calculator | Metric & Imperial Adult BMI
Adult BMI Calculator | Formula, Category & Context

pages.intent: Estimate adult body-fat percentage from circumference measurements.
pages.snippetAngle: U.S. Navy circumference estimate with measurement instructions and uncertainty.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own circumference-based body-fat estimates; BMI and waist pages remain screening tools.
titleTests: Body Fat Calculator | U.S. Navy Circumference Method
Body Fat Percentage Calculator | Metric & Imperial

pages.intent: Estimate maintenance energy from predicted BMR and an activity multiplier.
pages.snippetAngle: Estimate TDEE and maintenance energy, then calibrate it against a real trend.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own expenditure and maintenance estimation. Daily Calorie Goal owns explicit deficit or surplus targets.
titleTests: TDEE Calculator | Estimate Maintenance Calories
Total Daily Energy Expenditure Calculator | TDEE

pages.intent: Apply a disclosed percentage adjustment to estimated maintenance energy for loss, maintenance, or gain.
pages.snippetAngle: Choose a visible deficit, maintenance, or surplus adjustment and see the maintenance baseline.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own intake-goal adjustments. TDEE owns maintenance expenditure and BMR owns resting energy.
titleTests: Daily Calorie Goal Calculator | Deficit & Surplus
Calorie Deficit Calculator | Daily Goal From TDEE

pages.intent: Distribute an existing calorie target across adjustable protein, fat, and carbohydrate grams.
pages.snippetAngle: Custom protein factor and fat percentage with carbohydrates calculated from remaining calories.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own three-macronutrient distribution; Protein Calculator owns protein-only planning and Calorie Goal owns calorie selection.
titleTests: Macro Calculator | Custom Protein, Fat & Carbs
Macronutrient Calculator | Convert Calories To Grams
